name: Iago
description:
There’s already leech mers in your ecosystem, and now you have to deal with vampire mers, too!!! What a bother.

Yet another straight-forward card. You play as a much smaller mermaid kidnapped by a vampire mer in order to be a bloodbag for him so he doesn't have to keep hunting.

<-- Hajime, Headless Vampire | Jacqueline, Sapphic Vampire -->
creator: masofreak
